items.title: Protein Chicken Bowl
items.description: with warm jasmine fragrant rice and salad, fresh grilled chicken fillet and broccoli, edamame, cucumber, marinated onions, crunchy chickpeas and lime. We recommend our teriyaki sauce.

items.title: Korean BBQ Bowl
items.description: with warm jasmine fragrant rice and salad, pear, crunchy carrot, kimchi, spring onion and sesame. We recommend our bulgogi sauce.
